heading: Protection of oil reserves; contracts for conservation
label: 8724 Protection of oil reserves; contracts for conservation
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7424(4th par., less 1st proviso).34 U.S.C. 524(4th par., less 1st proviso, of amended 3d and 4th provisos), ; , ; , .June 4, 1920, ch. 22841 Stat. 813June 30, 1938, ch. 851, § 152 Stat. 1252June 17, 1944, ch. 26258 Stat. 282

Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 7424 of this title1980—Subsec. (a). substituted “Naval Petroleum Reserve Numbered 1” for “naval petroleum reserve numbered 1” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 96–5131976—Subsec. (a). struck out “of the Navy” after “Secretary”, “and oil shale” after “petroleum” in par. (1), and “in the ground” after “conservation” in subpar. (A) of par. (1).Pub. L. 94–2581962—Subsec. (a). inserted provisions in cl. (1) empowering the Secretary to contract with owners and lessees of land inside or adjoining oil shale reserves.Pub. L. 87–796

children.label: A
children.text: conservation of oil and gas; and

children.label: B
children.text: compensation for estimated drainage in lieu of drilling or operating offset wells; and

children.label: A
children.text: lands of the United States inside Naval Petroleum Reserve Numbered 1;

children.label: B
children.text: the right to royalty production from any of the naval petroleum reserves; and

children.label: C
children.text: the right to any money due the United States as a result of the wrongful extraction of petroleum products from lands inside Naval Petroleum Reserve Numbered 1.

children.label: b
children.text: The Secretary shall report annually to Congress all agreements under this section.
